name: mk-qa-master
description: AI 測試大師 — v1.1 QA testing skill backed by an MCP server. 22 tools (21 v1.0-frozen + analyze_stream): run / generate / debug / harden software tests via mk-qa-master. Includes the AI Visual Challenge Solver (reCAPTCHA / hCaptcha), OWASP API Security Top 10 scanner, universal qa_plan + verify bookend across 5 core tools, and the v1.1 Edge AI Runner (RTSP + YOLO via the [edge] extras). Same skill folder loads in Claude Code, Codex, OpenClaw, and Hermes.
